description: Quality Improvement Sprint 2 - Add tests, documentation, and code quality improvements

userStories.title: Add equals/hashCode to Timesheet entity
userStories.description: Add proper equals() and hashCode() methods to Timesheet.java using id field with null-safety.
acceptanceCriteria: Timesheet.java has equals() using Objects.equals() for id comparison
Timesheet.java has hashCode() using Objects.hash() for id
Handle null id by returning false in equals

userStories.description: Add @NonNull annotations on critical parameters in UserApplicationService method entry points.
acceptanceCriteria: Add @NonNull annotations on parameters that must not be null

userStories.title: Refactor Thread.sleep in TimesheetRepositoryTest
userStories.description: Replace Thread.sleep() with Clock.fixed() in TimesheetRepositoryTest for deterministic testing.
userStories.note: Used setCreatedAt() with LocalDateTime instead of Clock.fixed() - simpler approach for this case

userStories.title: Refactor Thread.sleep in UserTest
userStories.description: Replace Thread.sleep() with Clock.fixed() in UserTest for deterministic testing.
userStories.note: Used setUpdatedAt()/setLastLoginAt() with LocalDateTime instead of Clock.fixed() - simpler approach
